---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What hardware or protocol mechanism would this feature explore?**
MicroANT is a didactic project — new features should ideally expose an interesting low-level concept (USB, xHCI, ANT+, VGA, etc.).

**Describe the feature**
A clear description of what you'd like to add.

**Additional context**
Any references (xHCI spec, ANT+ device profiles, OSDev wiki articles, etc.) that would help implement this.
